_comment: Curated mirror of Anthropic's official course catalog (Anthropic Academy on Skilljar + the anthropics/courses GitHub interactive tutorials). Source-of-truth for the in-app Anthropic Courses mirror: we mirror the structure, deep-link OUT to the exact course to take it on Anthropic, and track completion LOCALLY. Researched 2026-05-19 from anthropic.com/learn + anthropic.skilljar.com + platform.claude.com docs. Skilljar account required to take a course (no separate Anthropic account); signupUrl is the Academy home where the account is created.

categories.title: Foundations
categories.blurb: Start here — understand Claude and AI fundamentals.

categories.title: Claude Code & Agents
categories.blurb: Agentic development with Claude Code, skills and subagents.

categories.title: Model Context Protocol
categories.blurb: Connect Claude to tools and services via MCP.

categories.title: AI Fluency
categories.blurb: Collaborate with AI effectively, ethically and safely — role-specific tracks.

categories.title: Hands-on interactive tutorials (GitHub)
categories.blurb: Free, code-along notebooks from the anthropics/courses repo.

courses.title: Claude 101
courses.description: Use Claude for everyday work tasks, understand core features, and find paths to more advanced learning.

courses.title: AI Capabilities and Limitations
courses.description: An introductory course about how AI works — what it can and cannot do.

courses.title: AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations
courses.description: Collaborate with AI systems effectively, efficiently, ethically and safely.

courses.title: Building with the Claude API
courses.description: The full spectrum of working with Anthropic models using the Claude API.

courses.title: Claude with Amazon Bedrock
courses.description: AWS accreditation program: working with Anthropic models through Amazon Bedrock.

courses.title: Claude with Google Cloud's Vertex AI
courses.description: The full spectrum of working with Anthropic models through Google Cloud's Vertex AI.

courses.title: Claude Code 101
courses.description: Use Claude Code effectively in your daily development workflow.

courses.title: Claude Code in Action
courses.description: Integrate Claude Code into your development workflow.

courses.title: Introduction to Claude Cowork
courses.description: The Cowork task loop, plugins, skills, file workflows, and responsible multi-step work management.

courses.title: Introduction to Agent Skills
courses.description: Build, configure and share reusable markdown Skills that Claude applies automatically.

courses.title: Introduction to Subagents
courses.description: Use and create sub-agents in Claude Code to manage context, delegate tasks and build specialized workflows.

courses.title: Introduction to Model Context Protocol
courses.description: Build MCP servers and clients — tools, resources and prompts to connect Claude with services.

courses.title: Model Context Protocol: Advanced Topics
courses.description: Advanced MCP patterns: sampling, notifications, file system access and transport mechanisms.

courses.title: AI Fluency for Students
courses.description: AI Fluency skills for learning, career planning and academic success through responsible collaboration.

courses.title: AI Fluency for Educators
courses.description: Apply AI Fluency into teaching practice and institutional strategy.

courses.title: Teaching AI Fluency
courses.description: Teach and assess AI Fluency in instructor-led settings.

courses.title: AI Fluency for Nonprofits
courses.description: Increase organizational impact and efficiency while maintaining mission alignment.

courses.title: AI Fluency for Small Businesses
courses.description: Increase organizational impact and efficiency for small business operations.

courses.title: Anthropic API Fundamentals
courses.description: Code-along notebooks: API access, message formatting, models, parameters, streaming, images.

courses.title: Prompt Engineering Interactive Tutorial
courses.description: Step-by-step interactive notebooks from basic to advanced prompting.

courses.title: Real World Prompting
courses.description: Apply prompt engineering to realistic, complex use cases.

courses.title: Prompt Evaluations
courses.description: Build and run evaluations to measure and improve prompt quality.

courses.title: Tool Use
courses.description: Implement tool use / function calling with Claude end to end.
